summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Syntrix Technologies digital agency website. All backend APIs and frontend components are fully functional with excellent integration.
passed_tests: API root endpoint connectivity (200 OK)
Contact form submission with valid data (200 OK)
Contact form validation for missing required fields (422 validation error)
Contact retrieval endpoint (200 OK)
Status check endpoints (POST/GET both working)
Navbar renders with logo 'Syntrix' and all 5 nav links
Navbar sticky functionality with backdrop blur and shadow effects
Hero section with correct headline and Stripe-style gradient background
Hero CTA buttons (Start Your Project, Explore Services) functional
Mission section with descriptive text and CTA buttons
Creative Process section with all 4 steps and images
Impact Stats section with 3 animated counters (250+, 98%, 180)
Testimonials carousel with navigation arrows and clickable dots
Services Timeline section with 6 service cards and vertical progress line
Contact Form with all required fields submitting to /api/contact successfully
Contact form success message and 'send another message' functionality
CTA section with action buttons
Footer with brand name, social links (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, GitHub), navigation links
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu
Mobile menu opens/closes with all nav links and action buttons
Scroll animations working throughout all sections
All interactive elements properly clickable
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (22/22 components tested)
